name: Hearty Vegetable Beef Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, cover the beef with water and add chopped onion, salt, and thyme. Bring to boil.
2. Skim any fat from the surface of the liquid.
3. Add split peas and simmer over low heat for 3-4 hours.
4. Add all remaining ingredients to the pot.
5. Cover and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
6. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
